description: TCEL Tenant-9 T9-030-Workflow-BPM package, generated from the spec folder as ECARMF knowledge-package metadata (structure faithful; universal AI-boundary/cross-tenant controls enforced, full control catalog carried as a knowledge asset for traceability). Depends on Foundation; does NOT re-declare RecordReceived; cross-package name collisions auto-omitted by the generator's claimed-names ledger.
name: TCEL T9-030-Workflow-BPM

rules.name: AI execution limits
rules.reasonTemplate: WF-013: denied - an AI agent may not take material actions; agents are advisory-only (AI Governance).

rules.name: Cross-tenant denial
rules.reasonTemplate: WF-014: access denied - cross-tenant access is prohibited (Security).

capabilities.name: TCEL T9-030-Workflow-BPM
capabilities.description: Domain capability generated from the T9 spec.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-030-Workflow-BPM Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: WF-013/WF-014 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: WF-001 Workflow registration | Governance | Require documented compliance: Workflow registration | Critical | Platform. WF-002 Version approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Version approval | Critical | Platform. WF-003 State validation | Governance | Require documented compliance: State validation | Critical | Platform. WF-004 Transition authority | Governance | Require documented compliance: Transition authority | Critical | Platform. WF-005 Segregation of duties | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Segregation of duties | Critical | Platform. WF-006 SLA timers | Governance | Require documented compliance: SLA timers | Critical | Platform. WF-007 Escalation | Corrective | Escalate by severity/age | Critical | Platform. WF-008 Idempotency | Governance | Require documented compliance: Idempotency | Critical | Platform. WF-009 Rollback | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | Critical | Platform. WF-010 Exception queue | Governance | Require documented compliance: Exception queue | Critical | Platform. WF-011 Evidence attachment | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Evidence attachment | Critical | Platform. WF-012 Human approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Human approval | Critical | Platform. WF-013 AI execution limits | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI execution limits | Critical | AI Governance. WF-014 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | Critical | Security. WF-015 Task ownership | Governance | Require documented compliance: Task ownership | Critical | Platform. WF-016 Delegation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Delegation | High | Platform. WF-017 Cancellation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Cancellation | High | Platform. WF-018 Recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Platform. WF-019 Audit trail | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Audit trail | High | Platform. WF-020 Reusable component approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Reusable component approval | High | Platform. WF-021 Domain rule ownership | Governance | Require documented compliance: Domain rule ownership | High | Platform. WF-022 Deployment approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Deployment approval | High | Platform. WF-023 Monitoring | Detective | Flag/alert on detected condition | High | Platform. WF-024 Capacity | Governance | Require documented compliance: Capacity | High | Platform. WF-025 Outcome tracking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Outcome tracking | High | Platform.
